en: If you love football, if you watch the Champions League,
we want you to be part of the CNN Football Club.
Every Thursday you can interact with some of the biggest names in the game
You can get in touch with me or our special guest via Twitter, Facebook,
or head to cnn.com slash football club where you can comment on my blog
and sign in on match days to see live stats and take part in the social debate
CNN FC, on TV, online, and always on the ball.
